title: Google Bans Coding With Its Biggest Attack On Devs Ever: AntiGravity 2.0
summary: Google launched Antigravity 2.0, an updated AI code editor that evolved from a traditional code assistant into a full agent control system powered by Gemini 3.5 Flash. The forced update migrated developers from direct coding workflows to supervising AI agents that build, test, and manage code in parallel.
